channel.title: the Cross Orlando
channel.description: The Cross Orlando is a congregation of people living under the reign of God. We gather together regularly, we're working in all sectors of our city and are always looking for ways to better care for each other.
channel.itunes:summary: The Cross Orlando is a congregation of people living under the reign of God. We gather together regularly, we're working in all sectors of our city and are always looking for ways to better care for each other.
channel.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer
channel.itunes:subtitle: The Cross Orlando is a congregation of people living under the reign of God. We gather together regularly, we're working in all sectors of our city and are always looking for ways to better care for each other.

item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: We Gather to be Reminded of Who We Are
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.itunes:subtitle: Matthew 26; Philippians 2
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: The Cross Orlando Core Values_Lineage
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.content:encoded: We value Lineage because it's important to remember that as we follow Jesus, we take our place in a long line of folks who've done the same.
item.itunes:summary: We value Lineage because it's important to remember that as we follow Jesus, we take our place in a long line of folks who've done the same.
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: The Cross Orlando Core Values_Life
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.content:encoded: Jesus came to bring the life of God back into the world, outside the garden. The life of God is robust, and does not end and is given freely to his people in the world.
item.itunes:summary: Jesus came to bring the life of God back into the world, outside the garden. The life of God is robust, and does not end and is given freely to his people in the world.
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: The Cross Orlando Values_Peace
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.content:encoded: The peace of God comes with the presence of his reign. It goes with his people wherever they go.
item.itunes:summary: The peace of God comes with the presence of his reign. It goes with his people wherever they go.
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: The Cross Orlando Core Values_Story
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.content:encoded: The scriptures are a story of God's work in the world. It may be easier if they were a text book or a list of doctrines, but God is more interested in being known than understood.
item.itunes:summary: The scriptures are a story of God's work in the world. It may be easier if they were a text book or a list of doctrines, but God is more interested in being known than understood.
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: Persecuted Get the Kingdom
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.content:encoded: Jesus expects that his followers will encounter persecution. Even more, he chose to incarnate among the persecuted. The good news is that the reward awaiting his own, will make any hardship worth it!
item.itunes:summary: Jesus expects that his followers will encounter persecution. Even more, he chose to incarnate among the persecuted. The good news is that the reward awaiting his own, will make any hardship worth it!
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: The Peacemakers will be called Children of God
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.content:encoded: The peace that transcends understanding comes with the Reign of God. In Matthew chapter 10 Jesus sends out his followers as emissaries of that reign. We can be beneficiaries and emissaries of that reign experiencing peace in our households and villages.
item.itunes:summary: The peace that transcends understanding comes with the Reign of God. In Matthew chapter 10 Jesus sends out his followers as emissaries of that reign. We can be beneficiaries and emissaries of that reign experiencing peace in our households and villages.
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: Pure In Heart Will See God
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.description: The Pure in Heart recognize that their only hope is in Jesus
item.content:encoded: In Psalm 24 we learn that "pure in heart" means we look only to the God of Abraham Isaac and Jacob for everything. In Luke chapter15 Jesus shares a parable that demonstrates what purity of heart looks like.
item.itunes:subtitle: The Pure in Heart recognize that their only hope is in Jesus
item.itunes:summary: In Psalm 24 we learn that "pure in heart" means we look only to the God of Abraham Isaac and Jacob for everything. In Luke chapter15 Jesus shares a parable that demonstrates what purity of heart looks like.
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: The Merciful are Shown Mercy
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.description: Jesus transforms us into merciful people
item.content:encoded: In Matthew ch. 18 Jesus shares a parable that reveals the nature and importance of mercy
item.itunes:subtitle: Jesus transforms us into merciful people
item.itunes:summary: In Matthew ch. 18 Jesus shares a parable that reveals the nature and importance of mercy
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: Hunger and Thirst
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.content:encoded: It's a beautiful thing to realize Jesus expects us to desire righteousness, not be righteous.
item.itunes:subtitle: Righteousness is an acquired taste.
item.itunes:summary: It's a beautiful thing to realize Jesus expects us to desire righteousness, not be righteous.
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: Meek Inherit the Earth
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.description: Meekness does not equal weakness. It's the willingness to submit
item.content:encoded: In the garden of gethsemane Jesus demonstrated meekness. It to courage to choose the cross in the name of meekness. In return Jesus is given the whole earth.
item.itunes:subtitle: Meekness does not equal weakness. It's the willingness to submit
item.itunes:summary: In the garden of gethsemane Jesus demonstrated meekness. It to courage to choose the cross in the name of meekness. In return Jesus is given the whole earth.
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: 1 Peter 3
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.content:encoded: When we follow Jesus we will get hardship, but also hope strong enough to endure.
item.itunes:summary: When we follow Jesus we will get hardship, but also hope strong enough to endure.
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: Living Stones
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.content:encoded: The resurrection of Jesus has turned us into living stones in the temple of God.
item.itunes:summary: The resurrection of Jesus has turned us into living stones in the temple of God.
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: Easter
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.description: He left the grave clothes behind
item.itunes:subtitle: He left the grave clothes behind
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer

item.title: American Lent week3
item.dc:creator: Ben Hoyer
item.content:encoded: You never need to worry about the significance of your work or the power of your love because you are the image bearers of God
item.itunes:subtitle: Identity
item.itunes:summary: You never need to worry about the significance of your work or the power of your love because you are the image bearers of God
item.itunes:author: Ben Hoyer
